message:
feat(webhook): add built-in formatters for Slack, Discord, and Teams

Introduces a Format field on WebhookConfig that selects a pre-built
JSON payload structure when Template is empty. This eliminates the need
for users to write custom Go templates for common notification platforms.

Supported formats:
- json: Raw event JSON (default, unchanged behavior)
- slack: Slack Block Kit with header, section, and fields blocks
- discord: Discord embed with color-coded severity, fields, and timestamp
- teams: Microsoft Teams Adaptive Card v1.5 with FactSet layout

Implementation details:
- New formatters.go with severity classification (info/success/warning/error)
  based on event type keywords (error, failed, crash → error; warn,
  rate_limit → warning; success, complete → success)
- Slack formatter uses Block Kit header + section + optional fields
- Discord formatter uses embed with color: red (error), yellow (warn),
  green (success), blue (info)
- Teams formatter uses Adaptive Card with TextBlock + FactSet
- All formatters handle sorted key-value pairs from event.Details
- Format validation occurs at registration time to fail fast

Also introduces managerContext to avoid context.Background() in tests
while maintaining proper cancellation semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
